# isEqual(to:)

**Instance Method**

Checks if shapes and element data type are the same as the input shaped type.

## Declaration

```swift
func isEqual(to object: MPSGraphShapedType?) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **object**: shapedType to compare to

## Return Value

True if equal, false if unequal
